Minimum Wages Act: Ensures minimum wages for workers, varies by state and skill level
Factories Act 1948: Regulates working conditions, hours, safety in factories
EPF: Employees Provident Fund - 12% contribution by employer and employee
ESI: Employees State Insurance for medical benefits
Gratuity: Payable after 5 years continuous service, 15 days salary per year
Working Hours: Maximum 48 hours per week, overtime double rate
